user.title: Create a Normified sensor
user.description: Choose the source and explicitly select only the conditioning behaviors to include.

data.name: Name override
data.enable_window: Process readings in a time window

data_description.name: Leave blank to derive the name from the source.
data_description.attribute: Leave blank to condition the source state.
data_description.hide_source: Cannot be used when conditioning an attribute.
data_description.enable_limits: Configure minimum, maximum, or specific numeric values to reject.
data_description.enable_calibration: Correct readings using raw and corrected value pairs.
data_description.enable_rounding: Round the final output to a chosen number of decimal places.
data_description.enable_window: Collect all accepted readings during one period and publish either their mean or the latest reading when it ends.
data_description.unit_of_measurement: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source. Attribute-based sources do not inherit metadata.
data_description.device_class: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source.
data_description.state_class: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source.
data_description.icon: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Normify
reconfigure.description: Change the source, metadata overrides, and conditioning behaviors. Blank metadata fields inherit from a state-based source.

data.name: Name override
data.enable_window: Process readings in a time window

data_description.name: Leave blank to derive the name from the source.
data_description.attribute: Leave blank to condition the source state.
data_description.hide_source: Cannot be used when conditioning an attribute.
data_description.enable_limits: Configure minimum, maximum, or specific numeric values to reject.
data_description.enable_calibration: Correct readings using raw and corrected value pairs.
data_description.enable_rounding: Round the final output to a chosen number of decimal places.
data_description.enable_window: Collect all accepted readings during one period and publish either their mean or the latest reading when it ends.
data_description.unit_of_measurement: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source. Attribute-based sources do not inherit metadata.
data_description.device_class: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source.
data_description.state_class: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source.
data_description.icon: Leave blank to inherit it from a state-based source.

value_limits.title: Reject bad values
value_limits.description: Only the rules entered here are added. Values outside the configured range are rejected.

data_description.minimum: Leave blank for no lower limit.
data_description.maximum: Leave blank for no upper limit.

calibration.title: Calibrate values
calibration.description: Enter raw and corrected value pairs, one pair per line.

rounding.title: Round output values
rounding.description: Round only the final conditioned value.

window.title: Process readings in a time window
window.description: Collect every accepted, calibrated reading during the period and publish exactly once when it ends.

data_description.duration: The same period controls both collection and publication.
data_description.output: Choose the arithmetic mean of all readings or the latest accepted reading.

error.invalid_configuration: The selected behavior configuration is invalid.

abort.already_configured: This Normify helper is already configured.
abort.invalid_import: The YAML conditioning configuration is invalid.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The Normify helper was reconfigured successfully.
